nasb.text: He was the ruler over all the kings from the Euphrates River even to the land of the Philistines, and as far as the border of Egypt.

esv.text: And he ruled over all the kings from the Euphrates to the land of the Philistines and to the border of Egypt.

cnv.text: 所羅門統治列王，從幼發拉底河到非利士地，直到埃及的邊界。

ccb.text: 所罗门统管从幼发拉底河到非利士地区，远至埃及边境的诸王。
